description: Style NoteDesigned for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, this shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.Product DetailsWhite shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, perforated and mesh inlays and stitched detailingPadded and meshed inner and tongueUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with circular nubs and upraised heelMaterial and CareSynthetic and rubberWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
